ReportForge.//: Path to the plugin-generated HTML report templates. Relative paths resolve against the app content root; here the repo-root HTMLReportsFolder is two levels up.

RdlRenderService.//: Base URL of the RdlRenderService side-process (.NET Framework 4.8) that renders the real .rdl report definitions. Run it separately: dotnet run --project ../RdlRenderService

ReportBrain.//: Base URL of the Python brain service (FastAPI) that decodes NL prompts and summarizes results via Ollama. Run it separately: cd ai-report-forge && uvicorn ai_report_forge.api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080
